sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐλάσσωνἐλάττων

- Transliteration: Elasson

- Phonetic: el-as'-sone

- Definition:

1. less

a. in age (younger)

b. in rank

c. in excellence, worse

- Origin: comparative of the same as G1646

- TDNT entry: 14:48,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Compound of the same as G1646; smaller (in size quantity age or quality): - less under worse younger.
